title: Scarey
compiled_truth: Scarey is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (2000-03-30 to 2002-02-04), Scarey sent 66 and received 76 emails, totalling 142 interactions. Top correspondents: [Usregcomm](people/usregcomm-isda) (40), [Mark E Haedicke](people/mark-e-haedicke) (11), [ Taylor](people/taylor) (11), [Rainslie](people/rainslie-isda) (10), [Fhampton](people/fhampton-bondmarkets) (8).
